data.name: label2.Text
data.value: Use basic Python syntax and the built-in functions provided by ReciPro

data.name: tableLayoutPanel1.LayoutSettings
data.value: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-16"?><TableLayoutSettings><Controls><Control Name="flowLayoutPanel1" Row="1" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /><Control Name="splitContainer2" Row="0" RowSpan="1" Column="0" ColumnSpan="1" /></Controls><Columns Styles="Percent,100" /><Rows Styles="Percent,100,AutoSize,0,Absolute,20" /></TableLayoutSettings>
